description: Compliance audit policy for the KP Cisco C9500-40X Campus Core switch. Derived from C9300-48 Compliance Baseline with C9500-specific additions: OSPF, Multicast (PIM sparse-mode, AutoRP), L3 routed uplinks (RU10) and downlinks (RD10), Info ACL Core tier, SNMP-Verizon ACL, and boot system flash:packages.conf. Custom fields used: tacacsServer1Name, tacacsServer2Name, tacacsKey, logServer1, logServer2, nameServer1, nameServer2, Region.
name: KP C9500-40X Campus Core Compliance Baseline

value: ^aaa authentication login default group tacacs\+ local$
^aaa authentication enable default group tacacs\+ enable$
^aaa accounting exec default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa accounting commands 1 default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa accounting system default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa authorization exec default group tacacs\+( local)? if-authenticated
^aaa authorization commands 1 default group tacacs\+( local)? if-authenticated
^aaa authorization commands 15 default group tacacs\+( local)? if-authenticated
^WILL RESULT IN PROSECUTION TO THE FULLEST$
^service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone$
^service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone$

rules.name: Extra-service-timestamps-debug
rules.description: service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone

value: ^service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone$

rules.name: Extra-service-timestamps-log
rules.description: service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone

value: ^service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone$

rules.name: Extra-hostname-set
rules.description: hostname must be configured (any non-empty value)

rules.name: Extra-no-login-on-success-log
rules.description: no login on-success log must be configured

rules.name: Extra-errdisable-recovery-cause-udld
rules.description: errdisable recovery cause udld must be configured

rules.name: Extra-errdisable-recovery-cause-link-flap
rules.description: errdisable recovery cause link-flap must be configured

rules.name: Extra-ip-tcp-synwait-time-5
rules.description: ip tcp synwait-time 5 must be configured

rules.name: TACACS-ip-tacacs-source-interface-Loopback0
rules.description: TACACS source interface must be Loopback0 on C9500 Campus Core

rules.name: Logging-source-interface-Loopback0-C9500
rules.description: Logging source interface must be Loopback0 on C9500

rules.name: Info-ACL-Core-remark-DEVICE-TIER-Core
rules.description: Info ACL Core - remark DEVICE TIER Core must be present

rules.name: Info-ACL-Core-remark-DEVICE-ROLE
rules.description: Info ACL Core - DEVICE ROLE remark (Primary|Secondary)

rules.name: Fwd-Protocol-no-ip-forward-protocol-nd-and-udp
rules.description: Disable IP forward-protocol nd and UDP helpers

rules.name: Multicast-Global-ip-multicast-routing
rules.description: Multicast - ip multicast-routing must be enabled

rules.name: Multicast-Global-ip-pim-autorp-listener
rules.description: Multicast - ip pim autorp listener must be configured

rules.name: Multicast-Core-ip-pim-send-rp-announce
rules.description: Multicast Core - ip pim send-rp-announce Loopback0

rules.name: Multicast-Core-ip-pim-send-rp-discovery
rules.description: Multicast Core - ip pim send-rp-discovery Loopback0

rules.name: OSPF-router-ospf-process
rules.description: OSPF - router ospf process must be configured

rules.name: OSPF-ip-ospf-name-lookup
rules.description: OSPF - ip ospf name-lookup must be configured

rules.name: OSPF-router-id-matches-loopback0
rules.description: OSPF router-id must be configured (matches Loopback0)

rules.name: OSPF-network-statement-present
rules.description: OSPF - at least one network statement must be configured

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-RU10-description
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces must have RU10 designator in description

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-no-switchport
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces must be routed (no switchport)

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-ospf-point-to-point
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces - ip ospf network point-to-point

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-ospf-hello-interval-2
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces - ip ospf hello-interval 2

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-ospf-retransmit-interval-1
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces - ip ospf retransmit-interval 1

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-pim-sparse-mode
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces - ip pim sparse-mode

rules.name: Interface-L3-uplink-qos-egress
rules.description: L3 uplink interfaces - service-policy output QOS6-EGRESS

rules.name: Interface-L3-downlink-RD10-description
rules.description: L3 downlink interfaces must have RD10 designator in description

rules.name: SNMP-Verizon-ip-access-list-standard-56
rules.description: SNMP-Verizon - ip access-list standard 56 must be configured

rules.name: Lines-con0-exec-timeout
rules.description: Line con 0 - exec-timeout 15 0 must be configured

rules.name: Lines-vty-transport-input-ssh
rules.description: Line vty - transport input ssh must be configured

rules.name: Lines-vty-session-timeout-15
rules.description: Line vty - session-timeout 15 must be configured

rules.name: STP-spanning-tree-loopguard-default
rules.description: STP - spanning-tree loopguard default must be configured

rules.name: ACL-Allowed-fs-dynamic-acl
rules.description: ACL Allowed - CounterAct dynamic fs_ and FS_ ACLs are permitted
